creator: rmgls@free.fr
text:
Hi,
 
 the port/audio/csound 5.17XX has portaudio as dependancy.
 unfortunately there is a version mismatch.
 the present portaudio is 18.1 and csound requires V19 which exists in
 www.portaudio.com/archives, i checked it.
    Please, can we upgrade?
 
 best regards
 
 raoul
 rmgls@free.fr
